name: optimind-docs
description: One command, /polish, that rebuilds Word and PDF reports as fully branded Optimind documents. A five-role subagent orchestration (Intake, Auditor, Classifier, DS-Extender, Renderer-QA) handles ambiguous content, extends the design system when novel elements appear (round-tripped to Figma via the use_figma MCP), and auto-retries on QA failure. Source text, numbers, dates, and values are preserved verbatim. Emits a branded .docx plus a classification sidecar and an HTML audit report for every run.
